title: Deliverable readiness with synthetic external dependency boundaries
originSignal: A copied deliverable must be assessed for external links, connections, formulas, and unresolved dependencies before release.
riskPattern: A workbook can look self-contained while package relationships or formula references still require unavailable external sources.
regressionChecks: Build an external dependency report for a synthetic copied deliverable.
Generate a non-destructive cleanup and verification plan before release.
Classify readiness separately from proof that a recipient can open and use the final workbook.
expectedEvidence: Dependency report records links, connections, package parts, and formula-reference risks.
Cleanup plan identifies safe copied-workbook actions.
Verification plan lists readiness assertions and unresolved dependency exceptions.
boundaries: This library stores only synthetic dependency shapes and no customer deliverables or external artifacts.
Structural readiness does not prove recipient permissions, source availability, or workbook behavior.
nextLiveWorkbookRequirement: Open a sanitized copied deliverable in each relevant recipient environment and capture dependency and behavior evidence.
